Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 10 another player.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock (PvP-3) More targets.

Quest Text

Description

This Captain Mark C Tain from the Galactic Patrol. We've noticed your handy work, and approve of your methods. There has been a lot of unrest in the Antor System, innocent space explorers getting shot at for no reason. We've decided to issue a large bounty on the stronger hostile players in this sector. Take down 10 pirates above level 3, we don't care who you target as long as they are a threat to the peace. And remember... we don't show any mercy to pirate scum!

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
